Venue Info
Media Gallery
Jack Singer Concert Hall
Calgary, AB, CAN
Seating Capacity: 2059
Venue Type : Auditorium

Total Gigs: 1
  DMB  (1)

Longest Performance:
05.10.98 - Jimi Thing (13:59)
Venue Picture
Description
The Jack Singer Concert Hall is permanent home to the Calgary Philharmonic Orchestra. Considered one of Canada’s few pure music halls, the Jack Singer opened in 1985 within the new Calgary Centre for Performing Arts.
